contracts.title: Synopsis / Solicitation for CHUTE ASSY, FLEX FEED, M240, NSN: 1005-01-172-3038

clauses.title: Requirements Relating to Compensation of Former DoD Officials
clauses.explanation: 'Golden parachute' rule — restrictions on compensating former DoD officials.

clauses.title: Requirement to Inform Employees of Whistleblower Rights
clauses.explanation: Inform employees of DoD-specific whistleblower rights and reporting channels.

clauses.title: Disclosure of Information
clauses.explanation: Don't release contract information publicly without CO authorization.

clauses.title: Control of Government Personnel Work Product
clauses.explanation: Government retains rights in work product from DoD personnel.

clauses.title: Safeguarding Covered Defense Information and Cyber Incident Reporting
clauses.explanation: Safeguard Covered Defense Information per NIST SP 800-171; report cyber incidents to DoD within 72 hours.

clauses.title: Notice of Authorized Disclosure of Information for Litigation Support
clauses.explanation: Disclose specified info in litigation support tasks.

clauses.title: Covered Defense Telecommunications Equipment or Services—Representation
clauses.explanation: Representation about covered defense telecom equipment/services.

clauses.title: Prohibition on the Acquisition of Covered Defense Telecommunications Equipment or Services—Representation
clauses.explanation: Representation about acquiring covered defense telecom equipment/services.

clauses.title: Prohibition on the Acquisition of Covered Defense Telecommunications Equipment or Services
clauses.explanation: You may not acquire or provide covered defense telecom equipment for DoD.

clauses.title: Notice of NIST SP 800-171 DoD Assessment Requirements
clauses.explanation: You must have posted a NIST SP 800-171 self-assessment score in SPRS before award.

clauses.title: NIST SP 800-171 DoD Assessment Requirements
clauses.explanation: You must provide NIST 800-171 assessment info on request; DoD may conduct Medium/High assessments.

clauses.title: Contractor Compliance with the Cybersecurity Maturity Model Certification Level Requirement
clauses.explanation: You must hold the required CMMC certification level before award.

clauses.title: Item Unique Identification and Valuation
clauses.explanation: Mark deliverables with an Item Unique Identifier (IUID) per MIL-STD-130; register in the DoD IUID registry.

clauses.title: Buy American—Balance of Payments Program Certificate
clauses.explanation: Certify country of origin for supplies (Buy American / Balance of Payments certificate).

clauses.title: Buy American and Balance of Payments Program
clauses.explanation: Provide only domestic or qualifying-country end products (DoD Buy American).

clauses.title: Qualifying Country Sources as Subcontractors
clauses.explanation: Your subcontractors must also source from the US or qualifying countries.

clauses.title: Preference for Certain Domestic Commodities
clauses.explanation: Certain commodities (food, hand tools, some chemicals) must be domestic — 'Preference for Certain Domestic Commodities.'

clauses.title: Export-Controlled Items
clauses.explanation: Comply with ITAR/EAR export-control laws; obtain any required licenses.

clauses.title: Rights in Technical Data—Noncommercial Items
clauses.explanation: Government gets a license to noncommercial technical data you deliver.

clauses.title: Technical Data—Commercial Items
clauses.explanation: Government gets a license to commercial technical data you deliver.

clauses.title: Electronic Submission of Payment Requests and Receiving Reports
clauses.explanation: Submit payment requests and receiving reports electronically via WAWF (iRAPT).

clauses.title: Wide Area WorkFlow Payment Instructions
clauses.explanation: WAWF-specific routing codes for your invoice (Pay DoDAAC etc.).

clauses.title: Levies on Contract Payments
clauses.explanation: IRS may levy payments on this contract to satisfy your federal tax debts.

clauses.title: Pricing of Contract Modifications
clauses.explanation: Contract modifications are priced per Truth in Negotiations Act (cost or pricing data).

clauses.title: Subcontracts for Commercial Products or Commercial Services
clauses.explanation: Flow the same requirements down to your commercial-item subcontractors.

clauses.title: Transportation of Supplies by Sea
clauses.explanation: Ocean shipments must move on US-flag vessels to the extent available.

clauses.title: Disclosure of Contractor Information
clauses.explanation: Handling and disclosure rules for contractor-provided info at DLA.

clauses.title: Time of Delivery
clauses.explanation: DLA delivery schedule — dictates required leadtime from contract award to shipment.

clauses.title: Reserved Contract Information
clauses.explanation: Reserved contract-information handling procedures.

clauses.title: Notice for Filling of Certain Solicitation Requirements
clauses.explanation: Notice about the procedure for filling certain solicitation requirements.

clauses.title: Technical and Quality Requirements
clauses.explanation: Higher-level technical and quality requirements may apply (e.g., ISO 9001, AS9100).

clauses.title: Standard Payment Instructions
clauses.explanation: Standard DLA payment instructions (specific routing).

clauses.title: Inspection and Acceptance at Origin
clauses.explanation: Inspection and acceptance is at origin (source inspection at your facility).

clauses.title: Higher-Level Contract Quality Requirements
clauses.explanation: Implement a higher-level quality management system (typically ISO 9001 or AS9100).

clauses.title: Quality System — DLA-Managed Items
clauses.explanation: DLA-managed items have specific quality-system requirements you must meet.

clauses.title: Item Peculiar Packaging and Marking
clauses.explanation: Item-peculiar packaging and marking — DLA-specific packing/marking specs.

clauses.title: Contractor Code of Business Ethics and Conduct
clauses.explanation: Maintain a written business-ethics code and an internal compliance/awareness program.

clauses.title: Reporting Executive Compensation and First-Tier Subcontract Awards
clauses.explanation: Report executive compensation if your annual federal revenue exceeds $30M.

clauses.title: System for Award Management Maintenance
clauses.explanation: Keep your SAM registration active throughout performance.

clauses.title: Commercial and Government Entity Code Reporting
clauses.explanation: You must have (and report) a CAGE code.

clauses.title: Representation Regarding Certain Telecommunications and Video Surveillance Services or Equipment
clauses.explanation: Represent whether you use covered Chinese telecom (Huawei, ZTE, Hytera, Hikvision, Dahua).

clauses.title: Prohibition on Contracting for Certain Telecommunications and Video Surveillance Services or Equipment
clauses.explanation: Section 889 — you cannot provide the government any covered Chinese telecom equipment/services.

clauses.title: Covered Telecommunications Equipment or Services—Representation
clauses.explanation: Additional covered-telecom representation flow-down.

clauses.title: Protecting the Government's Interest When Subcontracting with Contractors Debarred, Suspended, or Proposed for Debarment
clauses.explanation: Screen subcontractors against SAM.gov Exclusions before award; notify CO if you propose a debarred party.

clauses.title: Instructions to Offerors—Commercial Products and Commercial Services
clauses.explanation: Standard offer instructions for commercial-item solicitations (how and when to submit your bid).

clauses.title: Offeror Representations and Certifications—Commercial Products and Commercial Services
clauses.explanation: Consolidated annual reps & certs — submit once per year via SAM.

clauses.title: Contract Terms and Conditions—Commercial Products and Commercial Services
clauses.explanation: The standard commercial-item contract terms: payment, inspection, warranty, disputes.

clauses.title: Contract Terms and Conditions Required to Implement Statutes or Executive Orders—Commercial Products and Commercial Services
clauses.explanation: The list of statutorily required clauses that also apply to commercial contracts (EEO, small-business, labor, etc.).

clauses.title: Convict Labor
clauses.explanation: No convict labor in performance.

clauses.title: Child Labor—Cooperation with Authorities and Remedies
clauses.explanation: Comply with EO 13126 child-labor rules; sign the required certification.

clauses.title: Prohibition of Segregated Facilities
clauses.explanation: No segregated facilities.

clauses.title: Equal Opportunity
clauses.explanation: Equal-employment-opportunity — no discrimination by race, color, religion, sex, or national origin.

clauses.title: Equal Opportunity for Veterans
clauses.explanation: Affirmative action for protected veterans (contracts >$150K).

clauses.title: Equal Opportunity for Workers with Disabilities
clauses.explanation: Affirmative action for workers with disabilities (contracts >$15K).

clauses.title: Combating Trafficking in Persons
clauses.explanation: Zero-tolerance policy on human trafficking; specific prohibitions on your employees.

clauses.title: Buy American—Supplies
clauses.explanation: Buy American Act — supply end items must be domestic (or from a qualifying country).

clauses.title: Restrictions on Certain Foreign Purchases
clauses.explanation: Restriction on Certain Foreign Purchases — no items from OFAC-sanctioned countries.

clauses.title: Payment by Electronic Funds Transfer—System for Award Management
clauses.explanation: Payments only by EFT to the account in your SAM registration.

clauses.title: Providing Accelerated Payments to Small Business Subcontractors
clauses.explanation: You must pay your small-business subcontractors within 15 days.

clauses.title: Disputes
clauses.explanation: Contract disputes are handled under the Contract Disputes Act (appeals to the Boards).

clauses.title: Protest After Award
clauses.explanation: Post-award protest may pause performance while it's resolved.

clauses.title: Applicable Law for Breach of Contract Claim
clauses.explanation: US federal law governs any breach-of-contract claim.

clauses.title: Changes—Fixed-Price
clauses.explanation: Changes clause — the CO may unilaterally change certain contract terms; you get an equitable adjustment.

clauses.title: Inspection of Supplies—Fixed-Price
clauses.explanation: Inspection of Supplies — you're responsible for QC; government inspects at destination (or origin if specified).

clauses.title: F.o.b. Destination
clauses.explanation: F.o.b. Destination — you own the freight cost and risk of loss until delivery.

clauses.title: Default (Fixed-Price Supply and Service)
clauses.explanation: Default clause — government may terminate for cause; you may be liable for excess reprocurement costs.

clauses.title: Requirements Relating to Compensation of Former DoD Officials
clauses.explanation: 'Golden parachute' rule — restrictions on compensating former DoD officials.

clauses.title: Requirement to Inform Employees of Whistleblower Rights
clauses.explanation: Inform employees of DoD-specific whistleblower rights and reporting channels.

clauses.title: Disclosure of Information
clauses.explanation: Don't release contract information publicly without CO authorization.

clauses.title: Control of Government Personnel Work Product
clauses.explanation: Government retains rights in work product from DoD personnel.

clauses.explanation: Safeguard Covered Defense Information per NIST SP 800-171; report cyber incidents to DoD within 72 hours.

clauses.title: Notice of Authorized Disclosure of Information for Litigation Support
clauses.explanation: Disclose specified info in litigation support tasks.

clauses.title: Covered Defense Telecommunications Equipment or Services—Representation

clauses.explanation: You may not acquire or provide covered defense telecom equipment for DoD.

clauses.title: Buy American and Balance of Payments Program
clauses.explanation: Provide only domestic or qualifying-country end products (DoD Buy American).

clauses.title: Qualifying Country Sources as Subcontractors
clauses.explanation: Your subcontractors must also source from the US or qualifying countries.

clauses.title: Preference for Certain Domestic Commodities
clauses.explanation: Certain commodities (food, hand tools, some chemicals) must be domestic — 'Preference for Certain Domestic Commodities.'

clauses.title: Technical Data—Commercial Items
clauses.explanation: Government gets a license to commercial technical data you deliver.

clauses.title: Electronic Submission of Payment Requests and Receiving Reports

clauses.explanation: WAWF-specific routing codes for your invoice (Pay DoDAAC etc.).

clauses.explanation: Ocean shipments must move on US-flag vessels to the extent available.

clauses.title: Inspection and Acceptance at Origin

clauses.title: Reporting Executive Compensation and First-Tier Subcontract Awards
clauses.explanation: Report executive compensation if your annual federal revenue exceeds $30M.

clauses.title: System for Award Management Maintenance
clauses.explanation: Keep your SAM registration active throughout performance.

clauses.title: Commercial and Government Entity Code Reporting
clauses.explanation: You must have (and report) a CAGE code.

clauses.title: Representation Regarding Certain Telecommunications and Video Surveillance Services or Equipment
clauses.explanation: Represent whether you use covered Chinese telecom (Huawei, ZTE, Hytera, Hikvision, Dahua).

clauses.title: Prohibition on Contracting for Certain Telecommunications and Video Surveillance Services or Equipment
clauses.explanation: Section 889 — you cannot provide the government any covered Chinese telecom equipment/services.

clauses.title: Covered Telecommunications Equipment or Services—Representation
clauses.explanation: Additional covered-telecom representation flow-down.

clauses.title: Protecting the Government's Interest When Subcontracting with Contractors Debarred, Suspended, or Proposed for Debarment
clauses.explanation: Screen subcontractors against SAM.gov Exclusions before award; notify CO if you propose a debarred party.

clauses.title: Instructions to Offerors—Commercial Products and Commercial Services
clauses.explanation: Standard offer instructions for commercial-item solicitations (how and when to submit your bid).

clauses.title: Offeror Representations and Certifications—Commercial Products and Commercial Services
clauses.explanation: Consolidated annual reps & certs — submit once per year via SAM.

clauses.title: Contract Terms and Conditions—Commercial Products and Commercial Services
clauses.explanation: The standard commercial-item contract terms: payment, inspection, warranty, disputes.

clauses.title: Contract Terms and Conditions Required to Implement Statutes or Executive Orders—Commercial Products and Commercial Services
clauses.explanation: The list of statutorily required clauses that also apply to commercial contracts (EEO, small-business, labor, etc.).

clauses.title: Convict Labor
clauses.explanation: No convict labor in performance.

clauses.title: Child Labor—Cooperation with Authorities and Remedies
clauses.explanation: Comply with EO 13126 child-labor rules; sign the required certification.

clauses.title: Prohibition of Segregated Facilities
clauses.explanation: No segregated facilities.

clauses.title: Equal Opportunity
clauses.explanation: Equal-employment-opportunity — no discrimination by race, color, religion, sex, or national origin.

clauses.title: Equal Opportunity for Veterans
clauses.explanation: Affirmative action for protected veterans (contracts >$150K).

clauses.title: Equal Opportunity for Workers with Disabilities
clauses.explanation: Affirmative action for workers with disabilities (contracts >$15K).

clauses.title: Combating Trafficking in Persons
clauses.explanation: Zero-tolerance policy on human trafficking; specific prohibitions on your employees.

clauses.title: Buy American—Supplies
clauses.explanation: Buy American Act — supply end items must be domestic (or from a qualifying country).

clauses.title: Restrictions on Certain Foreign Purchases
clauses.explanation: Restriction on Certain Foreign Purchases — no items from OFAC-sanctioned countries.

clauses.title: Payment by Electronic Funds Transfer—System for Award Management
clauses.explanation: Payments only by EFT to the account in your SAM registration.

clauses.title: Providing Accelerated Payments to Small Business Subcontractors
clauses.explanation: You must pay your small-business subcontractors within 15 days.

clauses.title: Disputes
clauses.explanation: Contract disputes are handled under the Contract Disputes Act (appeals to the Boards).

clauses.title: Protest After Award
clauses.explanation: Post-award protest may pause performance while it's resolved.

clauses.title: Applicable Law for Breach of Contract Claim
clauses.explanation: US federal law governs any breach-of-contract claim.

clauses.title: Changes—Fixed-Price
clauses.explanation: Changes clause — the CO may unilaterally change certain contract terms; you get an equitable adjustment.

clauses.title: Inspection of Supplies—Fixed-Price
clauses.explanation: Inspection of Supplies — you're responsible for QC; government inspects at destination (or origin if specified).

clauses.title: F.o.b. Destination
clauses.explanation: F.o.b. Destination — you own the freight cost and risk of loss until delivery.

clauses.title: Default (Fixed-Price Supply and Service)
clauses.explanation: Default clause — government may terminate for cause; you may be liable for excess reprocurement costs.

clauses.title: Equal Opportunity for Veterans
clauses.explanation: Affirmative action for protected veterans (contracts >$150K).

clauses.title: Equal Opportunity for Workers with Disabilities
clauses.explanation: Affirmative action for workers with disabilities (contracts >$15K).

clauses.title: Combating Trafficking in Persons
clauses.explanation: Zero-tolerance policy on human trafficking; specific prohibitions on your employees.

clauses.title: Buy American—Supplies
clauses.explanation: Buy American Act — supply end items must be domestic (or from a qualifying country).

clauses.title: Restrictions on Certain Foreign Purchases
clauses.explanation: Restriction on Certain Foreign Purchases — no items from OFAC-sanctioned countries.

clauses.title: Payment by Electronic Funds Transfer—System for Award Management
clauses.explanation: Payments only by EFT to the account in your SAM registration.

clauses.title: Providing Accelerated Payments to Small Business Subcontractors
clauses.explanation: You must pay your small-business subcontractors within 15 days.

clauses.title: Disputes
clauses.explanation: Contract disputes are handled under the Contract Disputes Act (appeals to the Boards).

clauses.title: Protest After Award
clauses.explanation: Post-award protest may pause performance while it's resolved.

clauses.title: Applicable Law for Breach of Contract Claim
clauses.explanation: US federal law governs any breach-of-contract claim.

clauses.title: Changes—Fixed-Price
clauses.explanation: Changes clause — the CO may unilaterally change certain contract terms; you get an equitable adjustment.

clauses.title: Inspection of Supplies—Fixed-Price
clauses.explanation: Inspection of Supplies — you're responsible for QC; government inspects at destination (or origin if specified).

clauses.title: F.o.b. Destination
clauses.explanation: F.o.b. Destination — you own the freight cost and risk of loss until delivery.

clauses.title: Default (Fixed-Price Supply and Service)
clauses.explanation: Default clause — government may terminate for cause; you may be liable for excess reprocurement costs.

contracts.title: GUIDE, CARTRIDGE, SMA

clauses.title: Requirements Relating to Compensation of Former DoD Officials
clauses.explanation: 'Golden parachute' rule — restrictions on compensating former DoD officials.

clauses.title: Requirement to Inform Employees of Whistleblower Rights
clauses.explanation: Inform employees of DoD-specific whistleblower rights and reporting channels.

clauses.title: Disclosure of Information
clauses.explanation: Don't release contract information publicly without CO authorization.

clauses.title: Control of Government Personnel Work Product
clauses.explanation: Government retains rights in work product from DoD personnel.

clauses.title: Safeguarding Covered Defense Information and Cyber Incident Reporting
clauses.explanation: Safeguard Covered Defense Information per NIST SP 800-171; report cyber incidents to DoD within 72 hours.

clauses.title: Notice of Authorized Disclosure of Information for Litigation Support
clauses.explanation: Disclose specified info in litigation support tasks.

clauses.title: Covered Defense Telecommunications Equipment or Services—Representation
clauses.explanation: Representation about covered defense telecom equipment/services.

clauses.title: Prohibition on the Acquisition of Covered Defense Telecommunications Equipment or Services—Representation
clauses.explanation: Representation about acquiring covered defense telecom equipment/services.

clauses.title: Prohibition on the Acquisition of Covered Defense Telecommunications Equipment or Services
clauses.explanation: You may not acquire or provide covered defense telecom equipment for DoD.

clauses.title: Notice of NIST SP 800-171 DoD Assessment Requirements
clauses.explanation: You must have posted a NIST SP 800-171 self-assessment score in SPRS before award.

clauses.title: NIST SP 800-171 DoD Assessment Requirements
clauses.explanation: You must provide NIST 800-171 assessment info on request; DoD may conduct Medium/High assessments.

clauses.title: Contractor Compliance with the Cybersecurity Maturity Model Certification Level Requirement
clauses.explanation: You must hold the required CMMC certification level before award.

clauses.title: Item Unique Identification and Valuation
clauses.explanation: Mark deliverables with an Item Unique Identifier (IUID) per MIL-STD-130; register in the DoD IUID registry.

clauses.title: Buy American—Balance of Payments Program Certificate
clauses.explanation: Certify country of origin for supplies (Buy American / Balance of Payments certificate).

clauses.title: Buy American and Balance of Payments Program
clauses.explanation: Provide only domestic or qualifying-country end products (DoD Buy American).

clauses.title: Qualifying Country Sources as Subcontractors
clauses.explanation: Your subcontractors must also source from the US or qualifying countries.

clauses.title: Preference for Certain Domestic Commodities
clauses.explanation: Certain commodities (food, hand tools, some chemicals) must be domestic — 'Preference for Certain Domestic Commodities.'

clauses.title: Export-Controlled Items
clauses.explanation: Comply with ITAR/EAR export-control laws; obtain any required licenses.

clauses.title: Rights in Technical Data—Noncommercial Items
clauses.explanation: Government gets a license to noncommercial technical data you deliver.

clauses.title: Technical Data—Commercial Items
clauses.explanation: Government gets a license to commercial technical data you deliver.

clauses.title: Electronic Submission of Payment Requests and Receiving Reports
clauses.explanation: Submit payment requests and receiving reports electronically via WAWF (iRAPT).

clauses.title: Wide Area WorkFlow Payment Instructions
clauses.explanation: WAWF-specific routing codes for your invoice (Pay DoDAAC etc.).

clauses.title: Levies on Contract Payments
clauses.explanation: IRS may levy payments on this contract to satisfy your federal tax debts.

clauses.title: Pricing of Contract Modifications
clauses.explanation: Contract modifications are priced per Truth in Negotiations Act (cost or pricing data).

clauses.title: Subcontracts for Commercial Products or Commercial Services
clauses.explanation: Flow the same requirements down to your commercial-item subcontractors.

clauses.title: Transportation of Supplies by Sea
clauses.explanation: Ocean shipments must move on US-flag vessels to the extent available.

clauses.title: Disclosure of Contractor Information
clauses.explanation: Handling and disclosure rules for contractor-provided info at DLA.

clauses.title: Time of Delivery
clauses.explanation: DLA delivery schedule — dictates required leadtime from contract award to shipment.

clauses.title: Reserved Contract Information
clauses.explanation: Reserved contract-information handling procedures.

clauses.title: Notice for Filling of Certain Solicitation Requirements
clauses.explanation: Notice about the procedure for filling certain solicitation requirements.

clauses.title: Technical and Quality Requirements
clauses.explanation: Higher-level technical and quality requirements may apply (e.g., ISO 9001, AS9100).

clauses.title: Standard Payment Instructions
clauses.explanation: Standard DLA payment instructions (specific routing).

clauses.title: Inspection and Acceptance at Origin
clauses.explanation: Inspection and acceptance is at origin (source inspection at your facility).

clauses.title: Higher-Level Contract Quality Requirements
clauses.explanation: Implement a higher-level quality management system (typically ISO 9001 or AS9100).

clauses.title: Quality System — DLA-Managed Items
clauses.explanation: DLA-managed items have specific quality-system requirements you must meet.

clauses.title: Item Peculiar Packaging and Marking
clauses.explanation: Item-peculiar packaging and marking — DLA-specific packing/marking specs.

clauses.title: Contractor Code of Business Ethics and Conduct
clauses.explanation: Maintain a written business-ethics code and an internal compliance/awareness program.

clauses.title: Changes—Fixed-Price
clauses.explanation: Changes clause — the CO may unilaterally change certain contract terms; you get an equitable adjustment.

clauses.title: Inspection of Supplies—Fixed-Price
clauses.explanation: Inspection of Supplies — you're responsible for QC; government inspects at destination (or origin if specified).

clauses.title: F.o.b. Destination
clauses.explanation: F.o.b. Destination — you own the freight cost and risk of loss until delivery.

clauses.title: Default (Fixed-Price Supply and Service)
clauses.explanation: Default clause — government may terminate for cause; you may be liable for excess reprocurement costs.

contracts.title: PARTS KIT,GUN

clauses.title: Requirements Relating to Compensation of Former DoD Officials
clauses.explanation: 'Golden parachute' rule — restrictions on compensating former DoD officials.

clauses.title: Requirement to Inform Employees of Whistleblower Rights
clauses.explanation: Inform employees of DoD-specific whistleblower rights and reporting channels.

clauses.title: Disclosure of Information
clauses.explanation: Don't release contract information publicly without CO authorization.

clauses.title: Control of Government Personnel Work Product
clauses.explanation: Government retains rights in work product from DoD personnel.

clauses.title: Safeguarding Covered Defense Information and Cyber Incident Reporting
clauses.explanation: Safeguard Covered Defense Information per NIST SP 800-171; report cyber incidents to DoD within 72 hours.

clauses.title: Notice of Authorized Disclosure of Information for Litigation Support
clauses.explanation: Disclose specified info in litigation support tasks.

clauses.title: Covered Defense Telecommunications Equipment or Services—Representation
clauses.explanation: Representation about covered defense telecom equipment/services.

clauses.title: Prohibition on the Acquisition of Covered Defense Telecommunications Equipment or Services—Representation
clauses.explanation: Representation about acquiring covered defense telecom equipment/services.

clauses.title: Prohibition on the Acquisition of Covered Defense Telecommunications Equipment or Services
clauses.explanation: You may not acquire or provide covered defense telecom equipment for DoD.

clauses.title: Notice of NIST SP 800-171 DoD Assessment Requirements
clauses.explanation: You must have posted a NIST SP 800-171 self-assessment score in SPRS before award.

clauses.title: NIST SP 800-171 DoD Assessment Requirements
clauses.explanation: You must provide NIST 800-171 assessment info on request; DoD may conduct Medium/High assessments.

clauses.title: Contractor Compliance with the Cybersecurity Maturity Model Certification Level Requirement
clauses.explanation: You must hold the required CMMC certification level before award.

clauses.title: Item Unique Identification and Valuation
clauses.explanation: Mark deliverables with an Item Unique Identifier (IUID) per MIL-STD-130; register in the DoD IUID registry.

clauses.title: Buy American—Balance of Payments Program Certificate
clauses.explanation: Certify country of origin for supplies (Buy American / Balance of Payments certificate).

clauses.title: Buy American and Balance of Payments Program
clauses.explanation: Provide only domestic or qualifying-country end products (DoD Buy American).

clauses.title: Qualifying Country Sources as Subcontractors
clauses.explanation: Your subcontractors must also source from the US or qualifying countries.

clauses.title: Preference for Certain Domestic Commodities
clauses.explanation: Certain commodities (food, hand tools, some chemicals) must be domestic — 'Preference for Certain Domestic Commodities.'

clauses.title: Export-Controlled Items
clauses.explanation: Comply with ITAR/EAR export-control laws; obtain any required licenses.

clauses.explanation: Government gets a license to commercial technical data you deliver.

clauses.title: Electronic Submission of Payment Requests and Receiving Reports
clauses.explanation: Submit payment requests and receiving reports electronically via WAWF (iRAPT).

clauses.title: Wide Area WorkFlow Payment Instructions
clauses.explanation: WAWF-specific routing codes for your invoice (Pay DoDAAC etc.).

clauses.title: Levies on Contract Payments
clauses.explanation: IRS may levy payments on this contract to satisfy your federal tax debts.

clauses.title: Pricing of Contract Modifications
clauses.explanation: Contract modifications are priced per Truth in Negotiations Act (cost or pricing data).

clauses.title: Subcontracts for Commercial Products or Commercial Services
clauses.explanation: Flow the same requirements down to your commercial-item subcontractors.

clauses.title: Transportation of Supplies by Sea
clauses.explanation: Ocean shipments must move on US-flag vessels to the extent available.

clauses.title: Disclosure of Contractor Information
clauses.explanation: Handling and disclosure rules for contractor-provided info at DLA.

clauses.title: Time of Delivery
clauses.explanation: DLA delivery schedule — dictates required leadtime from contract award to shipment.

clauses.title: Reserved Contract Information
clauses.explanation: Reserved contract-information handling procedures.

clauses.title: Notice for Filling of Certain Solicitation Requirements
clauses.explanation: Notice about the procedure for filling certain solicitation requirements.

clauses.title: Technical and Quality Requirements
clauses.explanation: Higher-level technical and quality requirements may apply (e.g., ISO 9001, AS9100).

clauses.title: Standard Payment Instructions
clauses.explanation: Standard DLA payment instructions (specific routing).

clauses.title: Inspection and Acceptance at Origin
clauses.explanation: Inspection and acceptance is at origin (source inspection at your facility).

clauses.title: Higher-Level Contract Quality Requirements
clauses.explanation: Implement a higher-level quality management system (typically ISO 9001 or AS9100).

clauses.title: Quality System — DLA-Managed Items
clauses.explanation: DLA-managed items have specific quality-system requirements you must meet.

clauses.title: Item Peculiar Packaging and Marking
clauses.explanation: Item-peculiar packaging and marking — DLA-specific packing/marking specs.

clauses.title: Contractor Code of Business Ethics and Conduct
clauses.explanation: Maintain a written business-ethics code and an internal compliance/awareness program.

clauses.explanation: You must have (and report) a CAGE code.

clauses.title: Representation Regarding Certain Telecommunications and Video Surveillance Services or Equipment
clauses.explanation: Represent whether you use covered Chinese telecom (Huawei, ZTE, Hytera, Hikvision, Dahua).

clauses.explanation: Section 889 — you cannot provide the government any covered Chinese telecom equipment/services.

clauses.title: Covered Telecommunications Equipment or Services—Representation
clauses.explanation: Additional covered-telecom representation flow-down.

clauses.title: Protecting the Government's Interest When Subcontracting with Contractors Debarred, Suspended, or Proposed for Debarment
clauses.explanation: Screen subcontractors against SAM.gov Exclusions before award; notify CO if you propose a debarred party.

clauses.title: Instructions to Offerors—Commercial Products and Commercial Services
clauses.explanation: Standard offer instructions for commercial-item solicitations (how and when to submit your bid).

clauses.title: Offeror Representations and Certifications—Commercial Products and Commercial Services
clauses.explanation: Consolidated annual reps & certs — submit once per year via SAM.

clauses.title: Contract Terms and Conditions—Commercial Products and Commercial Services
clauses.explanation: The standard commercial-item contract terms: payment, inspection, warranty, disputes.

clauses.title: Contract Terms and Conditions Required to Implement Statutes or Executive Orders—Commercial Products and Commercial Services
clauses.explanation: The list of statutorily required clauses that also apply to commercial contracts (EEO, small-business, labor, etc.).

clauses.title: Convict Labor
clauses.explanation: No convict labor in performance.

clauses.title: Child Labor—Cooperation with Authorities and Remedies
clauses.explanation: Comply with EO 13126 child-labor rules; sign the required certification.

clauses.title: Prohibition of Segregated Facilities
clauses.explanation: No segregated facilities.

clauses.title: Equal Opportunity
clauses.explanation: Equal-employment-opportunity — no discrimination by race, color, religion, sex, or national origin.

clauses.title: Equal Opportunity for Veterans
clauses.explanation: Affirmative action for protected veterans (contracts >$150K).

clauses.title: Equal Opportunity for Workers with Disabilities
clauses.explanation: Affirmative action for workers with disabilities (contracts >$15K).

clauses.title: Combating Trafficking in Persons
clauses.explanation: Zero-tolerance policy on human trafficking; specific prohibitions on your employees.

clauses.title: Buy American—Supplies
clauses.explanation: Buy American Act — supply end items must be domestic (or from a qualifying country).

clauses.title: Restrictions on Certain Foreign Purchases
clauses.explanation: Restriction on Certain Foreign Purchases — no items from OFAC-sanctioned countries.

clauses.title: Payment by Electronic Funds Transfer—System for Award Management
clauses.explanation: Payments only by EFT to the account in your SAM registration.

clauses.title: Providing Accelerated Payments to Small Business Subcontractors
clauses.explanation: You must pay your small-business subcontractors within 15 days.

clauses.title: Disputes
clauses.explanation: Contract disputes are handled under the Contract Disputes Act (appeals to the Boards).

clauses.title: Protest After Award
clauses.explanation: Post-award protest may pause performance while it's resolved.

clauses.explanation: US federal law governs any breach-of-contract claim.

contracts.title: GATE,GUIDE

clauses.title: Requirements Relating to Compensation of Former DoD Officials
clauses.explanation: 'Golden parachute' rule — restrictions on compensating former DoD officials.

clauses.title: Requirement to Inform Employees of Whistleblower Rights
clauses.explanation: Inform employees of DoD-specific whistleblower rights and reporting channels.

clauses.title: Disclosure of Information
clauses.explanation: Don't release contract information publicly without CO authorization.

clauses.title: Control of Government Personnel Work Product
clauses.explanation: Government retains rights in work product from DoD personnel.

clauses.title: Safeguarding Covered Defense Information and Cyber Incident Reporting
clauses.explanation: Safeguard Covered Defense Information per NIST SP 800-171; report cyber incidents to DoD within 72 hours.

clauses.title: Notice of Authorized Disclosure of Information for Litigation Support
clauses.explanation: Disclose specified info in litigation support tasks.

clauses.title: Covered Defense Telecommunications Equipment or Services—Representation
clauses.explanation: Representation about covered defense telecom equipment/services.

clauses.title: Prohibition on the Acquisition of Covered Defense Telecommunications Equipment or Services—Representation
clauses.explanation: Representation about acquiring covered defense telecom equipment/services.

clauses.title: Prohibition on the Acquisition of Covered Defense Telecommunications Equipment or Services
clauses.explanation: You may not acquire or provide covered defense telecom equipment for DoD.

clauses.title: Notice of NIST SP 800-171 DoD Assessment Requirements
clauses.explanation: You must have posted a NIST SP 800-171 self-assessment score in SPRS before award.

clauses.title: NIST SP 800-171 DoD Assessment Requirements
clauses.explanation: You must provide NIST 800-171 assessment info on request; DoD may conduct Medium/High assessments.

clauses.title: Contractor Compliance with the Cybersecurity Maturity Model Certification Level Requirement
clauses.explanation: You must hold the required CMMC certification level before award.

clauses.title: Item Unique Identification and Valuation
clauses.explanation: Mark deliverables with an Item Unique Identifier (IUID) per MIL-STD-130; register in the DoD IUID registry.

clauses.title: Buy American—Balance of Payments Program Certificate
clauses.explanation: Certify country of origin for supplies (Buy American / Balance of Payments certificate).

clauses.title: Buy American and Balance of Payments Program
clauses.explanation: Provide only domestic or qualifying-country end products (DoD Buy American).

clauses.title: Qualifying Country Sources as Subcontractors
clauses.explanation: Your subcontractors must also source from the US or qualifying countries.

clauses.title: Preference for Certain Domestic Commodities
clauses.explanation: Certain commodities (food, hand tools, some chemicals) must be domestic — 'Preference for Certain Domestic Commodities.'

clauses.title: Export-Controlled Items
clauses.explanation: Comply with ITAR/EAR export-control laws; obtain any required licenses.

clauses.explanation: Government gets a license to noncommercial technical data you deliver.

clauses.title: Technical Data—Commercial Items
clauses.explanation: Government gets a license to commercial technical data you deliver.

clauses.title: Electronic Submission of Payment Requests and Receiving Reports
clauses.explanation: Submit payment requests and receiving reports electronically via WAWF (iRAPT).

clauses.title: Wide Area WorkFlow Payment Instructions
clauses.explanation: WAWF-specific routing codes for your invoice (Pay DoDAAC etc.).

clauses.title: Levies on Contract Payments
clauses.explanation: IRS may levy payments on this contract to satisfy your federal tax debts.

clauses.title: Pricing of Contract Modifications
clauses.explanation: Contract modifications are priced per Truth in Negotiations Act (cost or pricing data).

clauses.title: Subcontracts for Commercial Products or Commercial Services
clauses.explanation: Flow the same requirements down to your commercial-item subcontractors.

clauses.title: Transportation of Supplies by Sea
clauses.explanation: Ocean shipments must move on US-flag vessels to the extent available.

clauses.title: Disclosure of Contractor Information
clauses.explanation: Handling and disclosure rules for contractor-provided info at DLA.

clauses.title: Time of Delivery
clauses.explanation: DLA delivery schedule — dictates required leadtime from contract award to shipment.

clauses.title: Reserved Contract Information
clauses.explanation: Reserved contract-information handling procedures.

clauses.title: Notice for Filling of Certain Solicitation Requirements
clauses.explanation: Notice about the procedure for filling certain solicitation requirements.

clauses.title: Technical and Quality Requirements
clauses.explanation: Higher-level technical and quality requirements may apply (e.g., ISO 9001, AS9100).

clauses.title: Standard Payment Instructions
clauses.explanation: Standard DLA payment instructions (specific routing).

clauses.title: Inspection and Acceptance at Origin
clauses.explanation: Inspection and acceptance is at origin (source inspection at your facility).

clauses.title: Higher-Level Contract Quality Requirements
clauses.explanation: Implement a higher-level quality management system (typically ISO 9001 or AS9100).

clauses.title: Quality System — DLA-Managed Items
clauses.explanation: DLA-managed items have specific quality-system requirements you must meet.

clauses.title: Item Peculiar Packaging and Marking
clauses.explanation: Item-peculiar packaging and marking — DLA-specific packing/marking specs.

clauses.title: Contractor Code of Business Ethics and Conduct
clauses.explanation: Maintain a written business-ethics code and an internal compliance/awareness program.

clauses.title: Reporting Executive Compensation and First-Tier Subcontract Awards
clauses.explanation: Report executive compensation if your annual federal revenue exceeds $30M.

clauses.title: System for Award Management Maintenance
clauses.explanation: Keep your SAM registration active throughout performance.

clauses.title: Commercial and Government Entity Code Reporting
clauses.explanation: You must have (and report) a CAGE code.

clauses.title: Representation Regarding Certain Telecommunications and Video Surveillance Services or Equipment
clauses.explanation: Represent whether you use covered Chinese telecom (Huawei, ZTE, Hytera, Hikvision, Dahua).

clauses.title: Prohibition on Contracting for Certain Telecommunications and Video Surveillance Services or Equipment
clauses.explanation: Section 889 — you cannot provide the government any covered Chinese telecom equipment/services.

clauses.title: Covered Telecommunications Equipment or Services—Representation
clauses.explanation: Additional covered-telecom representation flow-down.

clauses.title: Protecting the Government's Interest When Subcontracting with Contractors Debarred, Suspended, or Proposed for Debarment
clauses.explanation: Screen subcontractors against SAM.gov Exclusions before award; notify CO if you propose a debarred party.

clauses.title: Instructions to Offerors—Commercial Products and Commercial Services
clauses.explanation: Standard offer instructions for commercial-item solicitations (how and when to submit your bid).

clauses.title: Offeror Representations and Certifications—Commercial Products and Commercial Services
clauses.explanation: Consolidated annual reps & certs — submit once per year via SAM.

clauses.title: Contract Terms and Conditions—Commercial Products and Commercial Services
clauses.explanation: The standard commercial-item contract terms: payment, inspection, warranty, disputes.

clauses.title: Contract Terms and Conditions Required to Implement Statutes or Executive Orders—Commercial Products and Commercial Services
clauses.explanation: The list of statutorily required clauses that also apply to commercial contracts (EEO, small-business, labor, etc.).

clauses.title: Convict Labor
clauses.explanation: No convict labor in performance.

clauses.title: Child Labor—Cooperation with Authorities and Remedies
clauses.explanation: Comply with EO 13126 child-labor rules; sign the required certification.

clauses.title: Prohibition of Segregated Facilities
clauses.explanation: No segregated facilities.

clauses.title: Equal Opportunity
clauses.explanation: Equal-employment-opportunity — no discrimination by race, color, religion, sex, or national origin.

clauses.title: Equal Opportunity for Veterans
clauses.explanation: Affirmative action for protected veterans (contracts >$150K).

clauses.title: Equal Opportunity for Workers with Disabilities
clauses.explanation: Affirmative action for workers with disabilities (contracts >$15K).

clauses.title: Combating Trafficking in Persons
clauses.explanation: Zero-tolerance policy on human trafficking; specific prohibitions on your employees.

clauses.title: Buy American—Supplies
clauses.explanation: Buy American Act — supply end items must be domestic (or from a qualifying country).

clauses.title: Restrictions on Certain Foreign Purchases
clauses.explanation: Restriction on Certain Foreign Purchases — no items from OFAC-sanctioned countries.

clauses.title: Payment by Electronic Funds Transfer—System for Award Management
clauses.explanation: Payments only by EFT to the account in your SAM registration.

clauses.title: Providing Accelerated Payments to Small Business Subcontractors
clauses.explanation: You must pay your small-business subcontractors within 15 days.

clauses.title: Disputes
clauses.explanation: Contract disputes are handled under the Contract Disputes Act (appeals to the Boards).

clauses.title: Protest After Award
clauses.explanation: Post-award protest may pause performance while it's resolved.

clauses.title: Applicable Law for Breach of Contract Claim
clauses.explanation: US federal law governs any breach-of-contract claim.

clauses.title: Changes—Fixed-Price
clauses.explanation: Changes clause — the CO may unilaterally change certain contract terms; you get an equitable adjustment.

clauses.title: Inspection of Supplies—Fixed-Price
clauses.explanation: Inspection of Supplies — you're responsible for QC; government inspects at destination (or origin if specified).

clauses.title: F.o.b. Destination
clauses.explanation: F.o.b. Destination — you own the freight cost and risk of loss until delivery.

clauses.title: Default (Fixed-Price Supply and Service)
clauses.explanation: Default clause — government may terminate for cause; you may be liable for excess reprocurement costs.

clauses.explanation: Report executive compensation if your annual federal revenue exceeds $30M.

clauses.title: System for Award Management Maintenance
clauses.explanation: Keep your SAM registration active throughout performance.

clauses.title: Commercial and Government Entity Code Reporting
clauses.explanation: You must have (and report) a CAGE code.

clauses.title: Representation Regarding Certain Telecommunications and Video Surveillance Services or Equipment
clauses.explanation: Represent whether you use covered Chinese telecom (Huawei, ZTE, Hytera, Hikvision, Dahua).

clauses.title: Prohibition on Contracting for Certain Telecommunications and Video Surveillance Services or Equipment
clauses.explanation: Section 889 — you cannot provide the government any covered Chinese telecom equipment/services.

clauses.title: Covered Telecommunications Equipment or Services—Representation
clauses.explanation: Additional covered-telecom representation flow-down.

clauses.title: Protecting the Government's Interest When Subcontracting with Contractors Debarred, Suspended, or Proposed for Debarment
clauses.explanation: Screen subcontractors against SAM.gov Exclusions before award; notify CO if you propose a debarred party.

clauses.title: Instructions to Offerors—Commercial Products and Commercial Services
clauses.explanation: Standard offer instructions for commercial-item solicitations (how and when to submit your bid).

clauses.title: Offeror Representations and Certifications—Commercial Products and Commercial Services
clauses.explanation: Consolidated annual reps & certs — submit once per year via SAM.

clauses.title: Contract Terms and Conditions—Commercial Products and Commercial Services
clauses.explanation: The standard commercial-item contract terms: payment, inspection, warranty, disputes.

clauses.title: Contract Terms and Conditions Required to Implement Statutes or Executive Orders—Commercial Products and Commercial Services
clauses.explanation: The list of statutorily required clauses that also apply to commercial contracts (EEO, small-business, labor, etc.).

clauses.title: Convict Labor
clauses.explanation: No convict labor in performance.

clauses.title: Child Labor—Cooperation with Authorities and Remedies
clauses.explanation: Comply with EO 13126 child-labor rules; sign the required certification.

clauses.title: Prohibition of Segregated Facilities
clauses.explanation: No segregated facilities.

clauses.title: Equal Opportunity
clauses.explanation: Equal-employment-opportunity — no discrimination by race, color, religion, sex, or national origin.

clauses.title: Equal Opportunity for Veterans
clauses.explanation: Affirmative action for protected veterans (contracts >$150K).

clauses.title: Equal Opportunity for Workers with Disabilities
clauses.explanation: Affirmative action for workers with disabilities (contracts >$15K).

clauses.title: Combating Trafficking in Persons
clauses.explanation: Zero-tolerance policy on human trafficking; specific prohibitions on your employees.

clauses.title: Buy American—Supplies
clauses.explanation: Buy American Act — supply end items must be domestic (or from a qualifying country).

clauses.title: Restrictions on Certain Foreign Purchases
clauses.explanation: Restriction on Certain Foreign Purchases — no items from OFAC-sanctioned countries.

clauses.title: Payment by Electronic Funds Transfer—System for Award Management
clauses.explanation: Payments only by EFT to the account in your SAM registration.

clauses.title: Providing Accelerated Payments to Small Business Subcontractors
clauses.explanation: You must pay your small-business subcontractors within 15 days.

clauses.title: Disputes
clauses.explanation: Contract disputes are handled under the Contract Disputes Act (appeals to the Boards).

clauses.title: Protest After Award
clauses.explanation: Post-award protest may pause performance while it's resolved.

clauses.title: Applicable Law for Breach of Contract Claim
clauses.explanation: US federal law governs any breach-of-contract claim.

clauses.title: Changes—Fixed-Price
clauses.explanation: Changes clause — the CO may unilaterally change certain contract terms; you get an equitable adjustment.

clauses.title: Inspection of Supplies—Fixed-Price
clauses.explanation: Inspection of Supplies — you're responsible for QC; government inspects at destination (or origin if specified).

clauses.title: F.o.b. Destination
clauses.explanation: F.o.b. Destination — you own the freight cost and risk of loss until delivery.

clauses.title: Default (Fixed-Price Supply and Service)
clauses.explanation: Default clause — government may terminate for cause; you may be liable for excess reprocurement costs.

clauses.title: Instructions to Offerors—Commercial Products and Commercial Services
clauses.explanation: Standard offer instructions for commercial-item solicitations (how and when to submit your bid).

clauses.explanation: Consolidated annual reps & certs — submit once per year via SAM.

clauses.title: Contract Terms and Conditions—Commercial Products and Commercial Services
clauses.explanation: The standard commercial-item contract terms: payment, inspection, warranty, disputes.

clauses.title: Convict Labor
clauses.explanation: No convict labor in performance.

clauses.explanation: Comply with EO 13126 child-labor rules; sign the required certification.

clauses.title: Prohibition of Segregated Facilities
clauses.explanation: No segregated facilities.

clauses.explanation: Equal-employment-opportunity — no discrimination by race, color, religion, sex, or national origin.

clauses.explanation: Affirmative action for protected veterans (contracts >$150K).

clauses.title: Equal Opportunity for Workers with Disabilities
clauses.explanation: Affirmative action for workers with disabilities (contracts >$15K).

clauses.title: Combating Trafficking in Persons
clauses.explanation: Zero-tolerance policy on human trafficking; specific prohibitions on your employees.

clauses.title: Buy American—Supplies
clauses.explanation: Buy American Act — supply end items must be domestic (or from a qualifying country).

clauses.title: Restrictions on Certain Foreign Purchases
clauses.explanation: Restriction on Certain Foreign Purchases — no items from OFAC-sanctioned countries.

clauses.title: Payment by Electronic Funds Transfer—System for Award Management
clauses.explanation: Payments only by EFT to the account in your SAM registration.

clauses.title: Providing Accelerated Payments to Small Business Subcontractors
clauses.explanation: You must pay your small-business subcontractors within 15 days.

clauses.title: Disputes
clauses.explanation: Contract disputes are handled under the Contract Disputes Act (appeals to the Boards).

clauses.title: Protest After Award
clauses.explanation: Post-award protest may pause performance while it's resolved.

clauses.title: Applicable Law for Breach of Contract Claim
clauses.explanation: US federal law governs any breach-of-contract claim.

clauses.title: Changes—Fixed-Price
clauses.explanation: Changes clause — the CO may unilaterally change certain contract terms; you get an equitable adjustment.

clauses.title: Inspection of Supplies—Fixed-Price
clauses.explanation: Inspection of Supplies — you're responsible for QC; government inspects at destination (or origin if specified).

clauses.title: F.o.b. Destination
clauses.explanation: F.o.b. Destination — you own the freight cost and risk of loss until delivery.

clauses.title: Default (Fixed-Price Supply and Service)
clauses.explanation: Default clause — government may terminate for cause; you may be liable for excess reprocurement costs.

clauses.explanation: You must pay your small-business subcontractors within 15 days.

clauses.explanation: Contract disputes are handled under the Contract Disputes Act (appeals to the Boards).

clauses.explanation: Post-award protest may pause performance while it's resolved.

clauses.explanation: US federal law governs any breach-of-contract claim.

clauses.explanation: Changes clause — the CO may unilaterally change certain contract terms; you get an equitable adjustment.

clauses.explanation: Inspection of Supplies — you're responsible for QC; government inspects at destination (or origin if specified).

clauses.title: Requirements Relating to Compensation of Former DoD Officials

clauses.title: Requirement to Inform Employees of Whistleblower Rights
clauses.explanation: Inform employees of DoD-specific whistleblower rights and reporting channels.

clauses.title: Disclosure of Information
clauses.explanation: Don't release contract information publicly without CO authorization.

clauses.title: Control of Government Personnel Work Product
clauses.explanation: Government retains rights in work product from DoD personnel.

clauses.title: Safeguarding Covered Defense Information and Cyber Incident Reporting
clauses.explanation: Safeguard Covered Defense Information per NIST SP 800-171; report cyber incidents to DoD within 72 hours.

clauses.title: Notice of Authorized Disclosure of Information for Litigation Support
clauses.explanation: Disclose specified info in litigation support tasks.

clauses.title: Covered Defense Telecommunications Equipment or Services—Representation
clauses.explanation: Representation about covered defense telecom equipment/services.

clauses.explanation: You may not acquire or provide covered defense telecom equipment for DoD.

clauses.explanation: You must provide NIST 800-171 assessment info on request; DoD may conduct Medium/High assessments.

clauses.explanation: Provide only domestic or qualifying-country end products (DoD Buy American).

clauses.explanation: Your subcontractors must also source from the US or qualifying countries.

clauses.title: Preference for Certain Domestic Commodities
clauses.explanation: Certain commodities (food, hand tools, some chemicals) must be domestic — 'Preference for Certain Domestic Commodities.'

clauses.title: Export-Controlled Items
clauses.explanation: Comply with ITAR/EAR export-control laws; obtain any required licenses.

clauses.title: Sources of Electronic Parts

clauses.title: Transportation of Supplies by Sea

clauses.explanation: Handling and disclosure rules for contractor-provided info at DLA.

clauses.title: Time of Delivery

clauses.title: Technical and Quality Requirements
clauses.explanation: Higher-level technical and quality requirements may apply (e.g., ISO 9001, AS9100).

clauses.title: Standard Payment Instructions
clauses.explanation: Standard DLA payment instructions (specific routing).

clauses.title: Inspection and Acceptance at Origin
clauses.explanation: Inspection and acceptance is at origin (source inspection at your facility).

clauses.title: Higher-Level Contract Quality Requirements
clauses.explanation: Implement a higher-level quality management system (typically ISO 9001 or AS9100).

clauses.title: Quality System — DLA-Managed Items
clauses.explanation: DLA-managed items have specific quality-system requirements you must meet.

clauses.title: Item Peculiar Packaging and Marking

clauses.explanation: Maintain a written business-ethics code and an internal compliance/awareness program.

clauses.title: Reporting Executive Compensation and First-Tier Subcontract Awards
clauses.explanation: Report executive compensation if your annual federal revenue exceeds $30M.

clauses.title: System for Award Management Maintenance
clauses.explanation: Keep your SAM registration active throughout performance.

clauses.title: Commercial and Government Entity Code Reporting
clauses.explanation: You must have (and report) a CAGE code.

clauses.title: Representation Regarding Certain Telecommunications and Video Surveillance Services or Equipment
clauses.explanation: Represent whether you use covered Chinese telecom (Huawei, ZTE, Hytera, Hikvision, Dahua).

clauses.title: Prohibition on Contracting for Certain Telecommunications and Video Surveillance Services or Equipment
clauses.explanation: Section 889 — you cannot provide the government any covered Chinese telecom equipment/services.

clauses.title: Covered Telecommunications Equipment or Services—Representation
clauses.explanation: Additional covered-telecom representation flow-down.

clauses.title: Protecting the Government's Interest When Subcontracting with Contractors Debarred, Suspended, or Proposed for Debarment
clauses.explanation: Screen subcontractors against SAM.gov Exclusions before award; notify CO if you propose a debarred party.

clauses.title: Instructions to Offerors—Commercial Products and Commercial Services
clauses.explanation: Standard offer instructions for commercial-item solicitations (how and when to submit your bid).

clauses.title: Offeror Representations and Certifications—Commercial Products and Commercial Services
clauses.explanation: Consolidated annual reps & certs — submit once per year via SAM.

clauses.title: Contract Terms and Conditions—Commercial Products and Commercial Services
clauses.explanation: The standard commercial-item contract terms: payment, inspection, warranty, disputes.

clauses.title: Contract Terms and Conditions Required to Implement Statutes or Executive Orders—Commercial Products and Commercial Services
clauses.explanation: The list of statutorily required clauses that also apply to commercial contracts (EEO, small-business, labor, etc.).

clauses.title: Convict Labor
clauses.explanation: No convict labor in performance.

clauses.title: Child Labor—Cooperation with Authorities and Remedies
clauses.explanation: Comply with EO 13126 child-labor rules; sign the required certification.

clauses.title: Prohibition of Segregated Facilities
clauses.explanation: No segregated facilities.

clauses.title: Equal Opportunity
clauses.explanation: Equal-employment-opportunity — no discrimination by race, color, religion, sex, or national origin.

clauses.title: Equal Opportunity for Veterans
clauses.explanation: Affirmative action for protected veterans (contracts >$150K).

clauses.title: Equal Opportunity for Workers with Disabilities
clauses.explanation: Affirmative action for workers with disabilities (contracts >$15K).

clauses.title: Combating Trafficking in Persons
clauses.explanation: Zero-tolerance policy on human trafficking; specific prohibitions on your employees.

clauses.title: Buy American—Supplies
clauses.explanation: Buy American Act — supply end items must be domestic (or from a qualifying country).

clauses.title: Restrictions on Certain Foreign Purchases
clauses.explanation: Restriction on Certain Foreign Purchases — no items from OFAC-sanctioned countries.

clauses.title: Payment by Electronic Funds Transfer—System for Award Management
clauses.explanation: Payments only by EFT to the account in your SAM registration.

clauses.title: Providing Accelerated Payments to Small Business Subcontractors
clauses.explanation: You must pay your small-business subcontractors within 15 days.

clauses.title: Disputes
clauses.explanation: Contract disputes are handled under the Contract Disputes Act (appeals to the Boards).

clauses.title: Protest After Award
clauses.explanation: Post-award protest may pause performance while it's resolved.

clauses.title: Applicable Law for Breach of Contract Claim
clauses.explanation: US federal law governs any breach-of-contract claim.

clauses.title: Changes—Fixed-Price
clauses.explanation: Changes clause — the CO may unilaterally change certain contract terms; you get an equitable adjustment.

clauses.title: Inspection of Supplies—Fixed-Price
clauses.explanation: Inspection of Supplies — you're responsible for QC; government inspects at destination (or origin if specified).

clauses.title: F.o.b. Destination
clauses.explanation: F.o.b. Destination — you own the freight cost and risk of loss until delivery.

clauses.title: Default (Fixed-Price Supply and Service)
clauses.explanation: Default clause — government may terminate for cause; you may be liable for excess reprocurement costs.

clauses.explanation: Screen subcontractors against SAM.gov Exclusions before award; notify CO if you propose a debarred party.

clauses.explanation: Standard offer instructions for commercial-item solicitations (how and when to submit your bid).

clauses.title: Contract Terms and Conditions—Commercial Products and Commercial Services
clauses.explanation: The standard commercial-item contract terms: payment, inspection, warranty, disputes.

clauses.title: Convict Labor
clauses.explanation: No convict labor in performance.

clauses.title: Child Labor—Cooperation with Authorities and Remedies
clauses.explanation: Comply with EO 13126 child-labor rules; sign the required certification.

clauses.title: Prohibition of Segregated Facilities
clauses.explanation: No segregated facilities.

clauses.title: Equal Opportunity
clauses.explanation: Equal-employment-opportunity — no discrimination by race, color, religion, sex, or national origin.

clauses.title: Equal Opportunity for Veterans
clauses.explanation: Affirmative action for protected veterans (contracts >$150K).

clauses.title: Equal Opportunity for Workers with Disabilities
clauses.explanation: Affirmative action for workers with disabilities (contracts >$15K).

clauses.title: Combating Trafficking in Persons
clauses.explanation: Zero-tolerance policy on human trafficking; specific prohibitions on your employees.

clauses.title: Buy American—Supplies
clauses.explanation: Buy American Act — supply end items must be domestic (or from a qualifying country).

clauses.title: Restrictions on Certain Foreign Purchases
clauses.explanation: Restriction on Certain Foreign Purchases — no items from OFAC-sanctioned countries.

clauses.title: Payment by Electronic Funds Transfer—System for Award Management
clauses.explanation: Payments only by EFT to the account in your SAM registration.

clauses.title: Providing Accelerated Payments to Small Business Subcontractors
clauses.explanation: You must pay your small-business subcontractors within 15 days.

clauses.title: Disputes
clauses.explanation: Contract disputes are handled under the Contract Disputes Act (appeals to the Boards).

clauses.title: Protest After Award
clauses.explanation: Post-award protest may pause performance while it's resolved.

clauses.title: Applicable Law for Breach of Contract Claim
clauses.explanation: US federal law governs any breach-of-contract claim.

clauses.title: Changes—Fixed-Price
clauses.explanation: Changes clause — the CO may unilaterally change certain contract terms; you get an equitable adjustment.

clauses.title: Inspection of Supplies—Fixed-Price
clauses.explanation: Inspection of Supplies — you're responsible for QC; government inspects at destination (or origin if specified).

clauses.title: F.o.b. Destination
clauses.explanation: F.o.b. Destination — you own the freight cost and risk of loss until delivery.

clauses.title: Default (Fixed-Price Supply and Service)
clauses.explanation: Default clause — government may terminate for cause; you may be liable for excess reprocurement costs.

clauses.title: Payment by Electronic Funds Transfer—System for Award Management
clauses.explanation: Payments only by EFT to the account in your SAM registration.

clauses.title: Providing Accelerated Payments to Small Business Subcontractors
clauses.explanation: You must pay your small-business subcontractors within 15 days.

clauses.title: Disputes
clauses.explanation: Contract disputes are handled under the Contract Disputes Act (appeals to the Boards).

clauses.title: Protest After Award
clauses.explanation: Post-award protest may pause performance while it's resolved.

clauses.title: Applicable Law for Breach of Contract Claim
clauses.explanation: US federal law governs any breach-of-contract claim.

clauses.title: Changes—Fixed-Price
clauses.explanation: Changes clause — the CO may unilaterally change certain contract terms; you get an equitable adjustment.

clauses.title: Inspection of Supplies—Fixed-Price
clauses.explanation: Inspection of Supplies — you're responsible for QC; government inspects at destination (or origin if specified).

clauses.title: F.o.b. Destination
clauses.explanation: F.o.b. Destination — you own the freight cost and risk of loss until delivery.

clauses.title: Default (Fixed-Price Supply and Service)
clauses.explanation: Default clause — government may terminate for cause; you may be liable for excess reprocurement costs.

clauses.title: Requirements Relating to Compensation of Former DoD Officials
clauses.explanation: 'Golden parachute' rule — restrictions on compensating former DoD officials.

clauses.title: Requirement to Inform Employees of Whistleblower Rights
clauses.explanation: Inform employees of DoD-specific whistleblower rights and reporting channels.

clauses.title: Disclosure of Information
clauses.explanation: Don't release contract information publicly without CO authorization.

clauses.title: Control of Government Personnel Work Product
clauses.explanation: Government retains rights in work product from DoD personnel.

clauses.title: Safeguarding Covered Defense Information and Cyber Incident Reporting
clauses.explanation: Safeguard Covered Defense Information per NIST SP 800-171; report cyber incidents to DoD within 72 hours.

clauses.explanation: Disclose specified info in litigation support tasks.

clauses.explanation: You may not acquire or provide covered defense telecom equipment for DoD.

clauses.explanation: You must have posted a NIST SP 800-171 self-assessment score in SPRS before award.

clauses.explanation: You must provide NIST 800-171 assessment info on request; DoD may conduct Medium/High assessments.

clauses.title: Contractor Compliance with the Cybersecurity Maturity Model Certification Level Requirement
clauses.explanation: You must hold the required CMMC certification level before award.

clauses.title: Item Unique Identification and Valuation
clauses.explanation: Mark deliverables with an Item Unique Identifier (IUID) per MIL-STD-130; register in the DoD IUID registry.

clauses.title: Prohibition of Hexavalent Chromium
clauses.explanation: No hexavalent chromium in deliverables unless the CO approves in writing.

clauses.explanation: Government gets a license to noncommercial technical data you deliver.

clauses.explanation: Government gets a license to commercial technical data you deliver.

clauses.explanation: Submit payment requests and receiving reports electronically via WAWF (iRAPT).

clauses.explanation: WAWF-specific routing codes for your invoice (Pay DoDAAC etc.).

clauses.title: Levies on Contract Payments
clauses.explanation: IRS may levy payments on this contract to satisfy your federal tax debts.

clauses.title: Pricing of Contract Modifications
clauses.explanation: Contract modifications are priced per Truth in Negotiations Act (cost or pricing data).

clauses.title: Subcontracts for Commercial Products or Commercial Services
clauses.explanation: Flow the same requirements down to your commercial-item subcontractors.

clauses.title: Transportation of Supplies by Sea
clauses.explanation: Ocean shipments must move on US-flag vessels to the extent available.

clauses.title: Disclosure of Contractor Information
clauses.explanation: Handling and disclosure rules for contractor-provided info at DLA.

clauses.title: Time of Delivery
clauses.explanation: DLA delivery schedule — dictates required leadtime from contract award to shipment.

clauses.title: Reserved Contract Information
clauses.explanation: Reserved contract-information handling procedures.

clauses.explanation: Higher-level technical and quality requirements may apply (e.g., ISO 9001, AS9100).

clauses.title: Standard Payment Instructions
clauses.explanation: Standard DLA payment instructions (specific routing).

clauses.title: Inspection and Acceptance at Origin
clauses.explanation: Inspection and acceptance is at origin (source inspection at your facility).

clauses.title: Higher-Level Contract Quality Requirements
clauses.explanation: Implement a higher-level quality management system (typically ISO 9001 or AS9100).

clauses.title: Quality System — DLA-Managed Items

clauses.title: Item Peculiar Packaging and Marking
clauses.explanation: Item-peculiar packaging and marking — DLA-specific packing/marking specs.

clauses.explanation: Maintain a written business-ethics code and an internal compliance/awareness program.

clauses.title: Equal Opportunity for Veterans
clauses.explanation: Affirmative action for protected veterans (contracts >$150K).

clauses.title: Equal Opportunity for Workers with Disabilities
clauses.explanation: Affirmative action for workers with disabilities (contracts >$15K).

clauses.title: Combating Trafficking in Persons
clauses.explanation: Zero-tolerance policy on human trafficking; specific prohibitions on your employees.

clauses.title: Buy American—Supplies
clauses.explanation: Buy American Act — supply end items must be domestic (or from a qualifying country).

clauses.title: Restrictions on Certain Foreign Purchases
clauses.explanation: Restriction on Certain Foreign Purchases — no items from OFAC-sanctioned countries.

clauses.title: Payment by Electronic Funds Transfer—System for Award Management
clauses.explanation: Payments only by EFT to the account in your SAM registration.

clauses.title: Providing Accelerated Payments to Small Business Subcontractors
clauses.explanation: You must pay your small-business subcontractors within 15 days.

clauses.title: Disputes
clauses.explanation: Contract disputes are handled under the Contract Disputes Act (appeals to the Boards).

clauses.title: Protest After Award
clauses.explanation: Post-award protest may pause performance while it's resolved.

clauses.title: Applicable Law for Breach of Contract Claim
clauses.explanation: US federal law governs any breach-of-contract claim.

clauses.title: Changes—Fixed-Price
clauses.explanation: Changes clause — the CO may unilaterally change certain contract terms; you get an equitable adjustment.

clauses.title: Inspection of Supplies—Fixed-Price
clauses.explanation: Inspection of Supplies — you're responsible for QC; government inspects at destination (or origin if specified).

clauses.title: F.o.b. Destination
clauses.explanation: F.o.b. Destination — you own the freight cost and risk of loss until delivery.

clauses.title: Default (Fixed-Price Supply and Service)
clauses.explanation: Default clause — government may terminate for cause; you may be liable for excess reprocurement costs.

clauses.title: Requirements Relating to Compensation of Former DoD Officials
clauses.explanation: 'Golden parachute' rule — restrictions on compensating former DoD officials.

clauses.title: Requirement to Inform Employees of Whistleblower Rights
clauses.explanation: Inform employees of DoD-specific whistleblower rights and reporting channels.

clauses.title: Disclosure of Information
clauses.explanation: Don't release contract information publicly without CO authorization.

clauses.title: Control of Government Personnel Work Product
clauses.explanation: Government retains rights in work product from DoD personnel.

clauses.title: Safeguarding Covered Defense Information and Cyber Incident Reporting
clauses.explanation: Safeguard Covered Defense Information per NIST SP 800-171; report cyber incidents to DoD within 72 hours.

clauses.title: Notice of Authorized Disclosure of Information for Litigation Support
clauses.explanation: Disclose specified info in litigation support tasks.

clauses.explanation: You may not acquire or provide covered defense telecom equipment for DoD.

clauses.explanation: You must have posted a NIST SP 800-171 self-assessment score in SPRS before award.

clauses.explanation: You must provide NIST 800-171 assessment info on request; DoD may conduct Medium/High assessments.

clauses.title: Contractor Compliance with the Cybersecurity Maturity Model Certification Level Requirement
clauses.explanation: You must hold the required CMMC certification level before award.

clauses.title: Item Unique Identification and Valuation
clauses.explanation: Mark deliverables with an Item Unique Identifier (IUID) per MIL-STD-130; register in the DoD IUID registry.

clauses.title: Prohibition of Hexavalent Chromium
clauses.explanation: No hexavalent chromium in deliverables unless the CO approves in writing.

clauses.explanation: Provide only domestic or qualifying-country end products (DoD Buy American).

clauses.explanation: Certain commodities (food, hand tools, some chemicals) must be domestic — 'Preference for Certain Domestic Commodities.'

clauses.explanation: Government gets a license to noncommercial technical data you deliver.

clauses.title: Technical Data—Commercial Items
clauses.explanation: Government gets a license to commercial technical data you deliver.

clauses.title: Electronic Submission of Payment Requests and Receiving Reports
clauses.explanation: Submit payment requests and receiving reports electronically via WAWF (iRAPT).

clauses.explanation: WAWF-specific routing codes for your invoice (Pay DoDAAC etc.).

clauses.title: Levies on Contract Payments
clauses.explanation: IRS may levy payments on this contract to satisfy your federal tax debts.

clauses.title: Pricing of Contract Modifications
clauses.explanation: Contract modifications are priced per Truth in Negotiations Act (cost or pricing data).

clauses.title: Subcontracts for Commercial Products or Commercial Services
clauses.explanation: Flow the same requirements down to your commercial-item subcontractors.

clauses.title: Transportation of Supplies by Sea
clauses.explanation: Ocean shipments must move on US-flag vessels to the extent available.

clauses.title: Disclosure of Contractor Information
clauses.explanation: Handling and disclosure rules for contractor-provided info at DLA.

clauses.title: Time of Delivery
clauses.explanation: DLA delivery schedule — dictates required leadtime from contract award to shipment.

clauses.title: Reserved Contract Information
clauses.explanation: Reserved contract-information handling procedures.

clauses.explanation: Higher-level technical and quality requirements may apply (e.g., ISO 9001, AS9100).

clauses.title: Standard Payment Instructions
clauses.explanation: Standard DLA payment instructions (specific routing).

clauses.title: Inspection and Acceptance at Origin
clauses.explanation: Inspection and acceptance is at origin (source inspection at your facility).

clauses.title: Higher-Level Contract Quality Requirements
clauses.explanation: Implement a higher-level quality management system (typically ISO 9001 or AS9100).

clauses.title: Quality System — DLA-Managed Items

clauses.explanation: Item-peculiar packaging and marking — DLA-specific packing/marking specs.

clauses.explanation: Maintain a written business-ethics code and an internal compliance/awareness program.

clauses.title: F.o.b. Destination
clauses.explanation: F.o.b. Destination — you own the freight cost and risk of loss until delivery.

clauses.title: Default (Fixed-Price Supply and Service)
clauses.explanation: Default clause — government may terminate for cause; you may be liable for excess reprocurement costs.
